title: Neocaspia foliosa
taxonomy: Neocaspia foliosa is classified as a flowering plant, belonging to the family Amaranthaceae. This plant is part of the genus Neocaspia, which is a group of succulent plants. Neocaspia foliosa is native to the Caucasus region, specifically in Azerbaijan and the Caucasus Mountains. The classification of Neocaspia foliosa is also supported by its leaf structure and growth habits, which are characteristic of succulent plants. As a member of the Amaranthaceae family, Neocaspia foliosa is closely related to other succulent plants in this family.
